headline: Fidelity Joins BlackRock, Vanguard in Offering Annuities in 401(k) Plans
summary: Fidelity Investments is adding an offering in early 2027 that will give investors access to a target-date fund with an embedded annuity via Nationwide and New York Life.  The new suite of collective investment trusts, called Freedom Lifetime, will add another layer to traditional strategies by converting a portion of an employee’s target-date balance into guaranteed lifetime income.  BlackRock’s LifePath Paycheck, which launched in 2024, also offers retirees guaranteed income via annuities.
